_README: Don't edit this by hand. Run `/setup` in Claude Code — the brand-setup skill interviews you and GENERATES your own brand.json + design-system.md from your answers. This .example file is just the shape.

identity.name: Your Name
identity.language: e.g. English, or Levantine Arabic + English tech terms
identity.voice: 3–5 words on how you sound (e.g. direct, warm, no hype)

fonts.heading: Pick in /setup
fonts.source: google or local — /setup asks if you have your own font files
